hero.subheadline: Waxbarasho bilaash ah, taageero bulsho oo ku habaysan dhaqanka dumarka nugul ee Norfolk.

impact.sectionDesc: Iyadoo la adeegsanayo waxbarashada ku habaysan dhaqanka, waxaan gaaraynaa dumarka ugu baahan taageerada.

gallery.sectionDesc: Hooyo kastaa waxay xaq u leedahay taageero ku habaysan dhaqanka, iyadoon loo eegin asalkeeda.
gallery.bottomText: Go Nurture Initiative CIC waa shirkad manfacda bulshada oo bixisa taageero bilaash ah dumarka nugul.

fundingBridge.sectionDesc: Iib kasta oo laga sameeyo garabka ganacsigu wuxuu si toos ah u maalgeliyay taageerada bulshada ee bilaashka ah.
fundingBridge.step1Desc: Iibso xirmooyinka waxbarashada hooyada ee Nurtured and Nourished Health Ltd
fundingBridge.step2Desc: Qayb faa'iidada ah ayaa loo wareejiyay Go Nurture CIC
fundingBridge.step3Desc: Maalgelintu waxay bixisaa waxbarasho ku habaysan dhaqanka dumarka nugul
fundingBridge.ctaDesc: Dashboard-ka daah-furnaanta wuxuu muujinayaa sida kasta oo rodol uu u abuuro saamayn.

footer.commercialDesc: Iibka shirkadda hoose ayaa maalgeliya adeegyadan bulshada bilaashka ah.

about.introTitle: Shirkad Manfacda Bulshada oo U Hagaagtay
about.introDesc: Go Nurture Initiative CIC waa shirkad manfacda bulshada oo bixisa waxbarasho bilaash ah, taageero bulsho oo ku habaysan dhaqanka dumarka nugul ee Norfolk.
about.missionDesc: Hooyo kastaa waxay xaq u leedahay taageero tayo sare leh, iyadoon loo eegin asalkeeda ama xaaladeeda maaliyadeed.
about.howDesc: Qayb faa'iidada shirkadda hoose ayaa loo wareejiyaa Go Nurture CIC si loo maalgeliyo barnaamijyada bulshada bilaashka ah.
about.pilotDesc: Barnaamijkeena tijaabada ah wuxuu taageerayaa 30 haween saddex kooxood oo sanadle ah.
about.referralDesc: Gelitaanka barnaamijyadeena waa kaliya iyadoo la marayo wada shaqeeyayaal la xaqiijiyay.
about.ctaTitle: Waxaad Doonaysaa Inaad Ogaato Wax Badan?
about.ctaDesc: Haddii aad tahay xirfadle caafimaad ama hay'ad bulsho, waxaan jeclaan lahayn inaan kula xiriirno.

programmes.introDesc: Barnaamijyadayada waxaa loogu talagalay dumarka nugul. Dhammaan fasaladu waa bilaash, oo lagu bixiyo jawi badbaado leh.
programmes.cohortsDesc: Sanad kasta, waxaan bixinaa saddex kooxood oo barnaamijkeena bulshada ah.
programmes.educationDesc: Fasaladayada ku habaysan dhaqanka waxay daboolaan uurka, dhalmada, iyo daryeelka hooyada.
programmes.supportDesc: Waxaan bixinaa taageero joogta ah kadib dhalmada si hooyo kastaa u dareento kalsooni.
programmes.multilingualDesc: Dhammaan barnaamijyada waxaa lagu bixiyaa taageero turjumaad oo luuqado kala duwan.
programmes.partnersTitle: Shabakad Wada Shaqeyn oo La Aaminaa
programmes.partnersDesc: Barnaamijyadayada waxaa laga heli karaa oo kaliya wada shaqeeyayaal la xaqiijiyay.

communitySupport.introTitle: Wada Jir Ayaa Nagu Xoog Badan
communitySupport.introDesc: Go Nurture Initiative CIC waxay la shaqeysaa shabakad hay'ado bulsho iyo xirfadlayaal caafimaad oo Norfolk.
communitySupport.partnersDesc: Waxaan la shaqeynaa wada shaqeeyayaal kala duwan oo khibrad u leh taageerada dumarka nugul.
communitySupport.partnerList: NHS Norfolk & Waveney | Umulisooyinka & Ilaaliyeyaasha Caafimaadka | English Plus | Bridge Plus | New Routes | Kaniisadaha | Masaajidyada | Adeegyada Taageerada Qoyska
communitySupport.supportTitle: Daryeel Dhammaystiran oo Ku Habaysan Dhaqanka
communitySupport.supportDesc1: Waxbarashada dhalmada oo luuqado badan ah
communitySupport.supportDesc3: Fasalo taageero oo keli ah hooyooyinka nugul
communitySupport.involveDesc: Haddii hay'addaadu la shaqeyso haweenka nugul Norfolk, waxaan ku casuumaynaa inaad ku biirto shabakadeena.

contact.introDesc: Haddii aad tahay wada shaqeye, taageere, ama qof bulshada ka mid ah oo raadinaya macluumaad, fadlan nala soo xiriir.
contact.partnerDesc: Haddii aad tahay xirfadle caafimaad oo xiiseynaya inaad noqoto wada shaqeye, fadlan adeegso foomka hoose.
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Noo sheeg wax badan oo ku saabsan weydiimahaaga...
contact.formSuccess: Waad ku mahadsan tahay fariintaada. Waxaan kugula xiriir doonnaa dhawaan.
contact.ctaDesc: Gal albaabka wada shaqeynta si aad u gudbiso codayn.
